name: IT-secapi-mobile-markdown
description: Harden ThemedMarkdown (apps/mobile): add an onLinkPress that validates the URL scheme and set an allowedImageHandlers allowlist (or disable remote images) so LLM-authored markdown cannot trigger arbitrary-URL navigation (F-027) or zero-click remote image loads.
acceptanceCriteria: F-027 remediated; link-scheme validation + image-handler allowlist covered by a ThemedMarkdown test.
